events.title: US Conducts New Wave of Strikes on Iran
events.desc: The U.S. military is conducting fresh strikes on Iran, hours after President Donald Trump declared that an interim agreement to end the war with Iran was 'over'. The strikes are aimed at degrading Iran's ability to threaten freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: US and Iran Exchange Strikes in Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: The US military reported hitting missile sites and command centers in Iran, while Iran stated it attacked US bases. This exchange follows attacks on cargo ships in the Strait of Hormuz, escalating tensions.

events.title: US Strikes Iran After Attack on Cargo Ship
events.desc: The US military conducted strikes on Iran following an attack on a cargo ship. Iran accused the US of violating their deal and stated it retaliated by striking targets linked to American forces.

events.title: Deadly Israeli Strikes in Gaza
events.desc: Israeli airstrikes in Khan Yunis and Gaza City resulted in five deaths and wounded individuals, including children. The attacks underscore the ongoing conflict and humanitarian crisis in the region.

events.title: US to Remove Syria from Terrorist Blacklist
events.desc: The United States announced its decision to delist Syria as a state sponsor of terrorism, a designation held since 1979. This move is seen as a significant boost to leader Ahmed al-Sharaa and aims to facilitate investment.

events.title: Bomb Blast in Damascus
events.desc: A bomb explosion occurred at a cafe near the Palace of Justice in Damascus, resulting in nine fatalities. No group has yet claimed responsibility for the attack.

events.title: Israel Strikes Southern Lebanon
events.desc: Following a new deal signed between Lebanon and Israel, Israeli forces conducted strikes in southern Lebanon, killing at least one person. Hezbollah condemned the new agreement.

events.title: Headteacher Among Four Killed in Israeli Attack on Lebanon
events.desc: The deadliest Israeli attack on Lebanon since the recent ceasefire claimed four lives, including a headteacher. The victims were traveling in a car after visiting family.

events.title: Fourteen Killed in Saudi Arabia Helicopter Crash
events.desc: A helicopter belonging to Saudi Aramco crashed, resulting in fourteen fatalities. The cause of the crash is currently under investigation.

events.title: Houthi Threat to Maritime Shipping
events.desc: This article re-examines the Houthi threat to maritime shipping in the Red Sea, noting the shift in global attention to the Strait of Hormuz and questioning the adequacy of the international response.

events.title: Somali Pirates Re-emerge
events.desc: Recent pirate attacks, including the hijacking of three merchant vessels, signal the resurgence of Somali piracy. The article notes the absence of the multinational coalitions that previously combatted the threat.

events.title: US Military Strikes Iran's Nuclear and Military Infrastructure
events.desc: The U.S. military is conducting strikes targeting Iran's nuclear sites, ballistic missile infrastructure, and naval bases. This action follows heightened tensions and attacks on commercial shipping.

events.title: Rahm Emanuel Urges Israel to Change Course on Palestinians
events.desc: Rahm Emanuel, considering a 2028 presidential run, advised Israel to alter its approach to the Palestinian issue, warning that growing unease among U.S. voters risks jeopardizing the alliance with Washington.

events.title: Pakistan Urges Adherence to Islamabad MoU
events.desc: Following President Trump's declaration that the interim deal with Iran was 'over,' Pakistan urged all parties to uphold their commitments under the Islamabad Memorandum of Understanding, emphasizing its role in regional stability.

events.title: Gathering Clouds: Building Digital Strategic Depth
events.desc: This article discusses the increasing vulnerability of data centers and cloud regions as strategic targets in modern warfare due to cyber capabilities and long-range strike systems. It calls for a re-evaluation of 'strategic depth' in the context of data resilience.
